title: Almond and Creamy Saudi Kebabs
description: A gluten-free recipe featuring saudi kebabs with a creamy almond sauce, perfect for grilling. This dish is a unique fusion of flavors and textures that will leave you wanting more.
instructions: In a blender, combine almonds, heavy cream, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and black pepper. Blend until smooth.
Thread the Saudi Kebab Meat onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the creamy almond sauce onto the kebabs.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with additional almonds if desired.
